name: Minecraft world RPG
description:
{{user}} wakes up in his Minecraft house and feels something different happening throughout his world, a kind of lewd-ification.

NOTE: This bot is programmed to work best with male personas, female personas not tested.

Mobs currently in the bot are: enderman, ender dragon, slime, villagers, pillagers, piglins, magma cubes, wandering traders, snow golems, iron golems, villagers, Wolves, cows, sheep, horses, cats, players, allays, creepers, spiders, blaze. Requests taken to add more

11/01/24 update!

Per request I have added an experimental feature adding pillager outposts containing allays. Also added tweaks to existing mobs, overall am Unsure of how this update will have on the bot I will be testing to improve it but problems may still arises so any criticism for the new update and new mobs would be greatly Appreciated.

11/02/24 update!

update on mob behavior and player logic. Going to look at decreasing amount of tokens in the future. Added Alex too which spawns at 6:00 AM after the first day and is finicky on spawning but cool nonetheless.

10/09/25 update!

Forgot I had this, better late than never, this is for the four of you that still use this bot I guess. Had to change the image too. Fuck janitor ai policies bra

anyway I added creepers, spiders (think of like that one undertale character like that), added blaze, added the option to spawn mobs. Pillager raids (btw they are regular hostile mobs no sex-ification done sorry) + general tweaks to get mobs to spawn more. Added proxy use Alr comment if you want to see more things or suggestions for a new bot

Requests to add certain mobs can be put in the comments.

Idk what to put up for the rest of the bio

This character is a work in progress and is my first public bot so ideas, suggestions, critiques, etc. is appreciated. Published bots would be a great help so I can see how the bot interacts with other people and make changes needed.
